How I find new music

  • posts
  • music

I listen to a lot of music. Maybe not as much as some people, but a lot more than most of the people I know. One of my favorite things is finding an artist that doesn't have many monthly listeners that has a great sound. I want to share with all of you how I find new music and maybe introduce a weekly post on new music I find!

Tools
